benchmark_name: SAF-T / e-invoicing synthetic compliance gold obligations
method_note: Rule-based proxy benchmark against a hand-written synthetic gold set. A generated obligation may match multiple granular gold obligations. Not a production compliance evaluation.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: Invoices in a Portuguese SAF-T export must include the customer tax identification number.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: Invoices in a Portuguese SAF-T export must include the customer tax identification number.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: Invoices in a Portuguese SAF-T export must include the invoice date.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: Invoices in a Portuguese SAF-T export must include the invoice date.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: Invoices in a Portuguese SAF-T export must include the tax code.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: Invoices in a Portuguese SAF-T export must include the tax code.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: Invoices in a Portuguese SAF-T export must include the invoice total.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: Invoices in a Portuguese SAF-T export must include the invoice total.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: Customer account reference must be included where applicable.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: Customer account reference must be included where applicable.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: Records with missing tax identifiers should be corrected before export.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: Records with missing tax identifiers should be corrected before export.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: Records with inconsistent totals should be corrected before export.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: Records with inconsistent totals should be corrected before export.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: The product should maintain validation evidence to support user review and audit checks.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: The product should maintain validation evidence to support user review and audit checks.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: Export reports must show which invoice records failed validation.
match_matrix.best_generated_obligation: Invoices in a Portuguese SAF-T export must include the invoice date.

match_matrix.gold_obligation: Export reports must show why invoice records failed validation.
